---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Germán Pupato"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](files/CV_Pupato_Apr_2026.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

<br>

<iframe src="files/CV_Pupato_Apr_2026.pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px;">
  Your browser does not support embedded PDFs. [Download the CV instead.](files/CV_Pupato_Apr_2026.pdf)
</iframe>
